concept: Consider an action game where the player manipulates a character made of living crystal that refracts light to create various effects in the environment. Different facet configurations direct light beams to activate ancient machinery, reveal hidden pathways, or concentrate solar energy into defensive weapons. Environmental challenges involve navigating areas of darkness where your crystalline body cannot function without capturing and storing light sources. Enemy creatures made of shadow fear direct illumination but can corrupt your crystal structure if they make contact during darkness. The ultimate challenge involves ascending a massive prism tower during a solar eclipse, requiring perfect timing to capture and redirect the last ray of light before complete darkness envelops the world.
